title: Validation only checks key presence, not empty/whitespace values
evidence: book_api/book_api/app.py:30 — `'title' not in data` passes for {"title": "", "author": ""}; empty strings are accepted and persisted
suggestion: Reject when title/author are missing OR empty after strip()

title: Redundant nested directory book_api/book_api/
evidence: app.py lives at book_api/book_api/app.py — double-nested package dir with no purpose
suggestion: Flatten to a single book_api/ directory

title: POST echoes back raw request body including unexpected fields
evidence: book_api/book_api/app.py:42 — `jsonify({"id": book_id, **data})` reflects any extra keys the client sent rather than the persisted record
suggestion: Return the canonical stored fields (title/author/year/isbn) rather than spreading raw input
